Grace feeling.
Sometimes it’s butterflies the stomach, and takes breath away.
feel this way every time think husband.
met and married years ago.
see God’s grace our meeting, getting married, and living our life together husband and wife.
Sometimes it’s jolt, like electric shock and then overwhelming wave love, like the enormous amount love felt when held first baby arms for the first time.

have power stop things from happening and only recourse just constantly pray.
Mostly it’s feeling ultimate peace and over-whelming calmness that comes over different times during the day when God allows glimpses HIS love for me: when dog and cat are doing something cute together; when see the birds eating the seed put out for them; when certain little girl comes over the house and calls “Grandma”.
just breathe sigh thanksgiving and relax the comfort His hand.

today November) the United Nations Security Council (UNSC) has spoken with one voice the appalling situation Rakhine State, Burma.
The has repeatedly called the Burmese security forces protect all civilians and act now stop the violence and allow humanitarian aid urgently reach all those who need it.
The UNSC has today joined that call, with this historic Presidential Statement Burma.
encouraged see State Counsellor Aung San Suu Kyi making important steps forward, including establishing domestic body deliver humanitarian and development assistance Rakhine, and making efforts promote interfaith and intercommunal harmony, including recent visit northern Rakhine.
The will watching closely ensure that the Burmese security forces not attempt frustrate these efforts.
The U.K. and France initially circulated proposed Security Council resolution Myanmar late October, but China and Russia refused engage and negotiate, diplomats said.
China finally agreed similar text with minor changes presidential statement—which carries less weight than resolution—and Russia followed suit.
Mr. Guterres has been outspoken about the Myanmar crisis and urged the Security Council prevent continued bloodshed and curb the refugee flow.

Menara Taming Sari (Melaka Tower) located Bandar Hilir, beside Dataran Pahlawan Megamall.
the first and only gyro tower Malaysia far.
The tower revolves <hide>° provide panoramic view Malacca town.
From height meters, the ride offers you spectacular and panaromic view Historical Melaka City and far with host interesting sights such Paul’s Hill, Independence Memorial Building, Samudera Museum and the ship, Flor Mar, Melaka River, Dataran Pahlawan, Pulau Selat Mosque, Pulau Besar and the Straits Malacca.
That apart, you will also see the fast and rapid development taking place the state.
The air-conditioned circular observation deck can take people any one time.
You'll stay there for about seven minutes.
Once reaches the top, breathtaking, sprawling view Malacca far the eye can see, the Straits Malacca, clearly visible, especially good weather, with the Melaka River running through the grand panorama below.
addition the revolving tower for visitors enjoy bird view Melaka city, the ticketing building will also fitted with commercial outlets, which includes cafe, restaurant, and souvenir shops.
The admission charges for Menara Taming Sari are RM<hide> for adult and RM<hide> for children below years old.

Educating women, particular, has unmatched transformative power.
not only empowers them but also has positive effect their family and surroundings.
Women with more education tend have fewer children, which benefits them, their families and the society large.
Education also one the most powerful elements improving people’s health.
saves the lives millions mothers and children, helps prevent diseases, and essential component efforts reduce malnutrition.
Educated mothers are better informed about diseases; therefore, they take preventative measures, recognize signs illness early and tend use health care services more often.
create awareness regarding the importance girl child eductaion, SOC Films collaboration with Chime Change, created series short documentaries young girls who want achieve their dreams and aspirations seek excellence various professions future whether it's sports, literature, science, math, activism, and forth.
Chime for Change, global movement aimed strengthening voices speaking out support the cause promoting justice, health and education for girls and women the world over.
These documentaries were screened event New York <hide>th October this year, which also celebrated the International Day the Gir

Child.
The event was also featured Huffington Post.
Areeba Fatima, student Dawood Public School, one the biggest girls’ school Karachi, also featured one the documentaries where she expresses her desire become diplomat able represent Pakistan the and paint positive picture the country.
The documentary can viewed here: <hide> Dawood Public School among the very few schools that aim empower women giving them the confidence facing the world through participation many extracurricular activities including sports, debates, performing arts etc.

Schwarz has been the president the Greater Cleveland Film Commission for over ten years.
has over thirty years experience the film and television industries, working predominantly location manager and producer.
His work includes “Wild Heart,” “My Name Earl,” “Entourage,” “The Comeback,” “From the Earth the Moon” and Tom Hanks and Steven Spielberg’s “Band Brothers,” for which Ivan won Golden Globe.
The Film Commission the only nonprofit organization dedicated bringing jobs and economic impact Northeast Ohio through the growth sustainable media production industry.
Since passing the Ohio Motion Picture Tax Credit <hide>, more than <hide> productions have shot Cleveland, including “The Avengers,” “Captain America: The Winter Soldier,” and most recently, Matthew McConaughey’s “White Boy Rick” and Helen Hunt’s See You”.

all appointments, mail, reminders, to-do lists, Facebook, Twitter, Messenger, Google, and favorite games.)
These days, the “must-have” gadgets are endless—from smartphones, iPads, laptops, and gaming equipment right down home TVs!
you’re able have some these nice things and enjoy them and they help you with your work and studies, are also fun source entertainment, technology can great.
But it’s good step back sometimes and imagine what would like one day all those things instantly disappeared.
After your initial withdrawal symptoms, you’d realize that life goes without material things.
What matters most are our loved ones—our friends and family members.
Sometimes can forget this truth, and that’s when tend act selfishly.
The act giving not only helps those give to, but well.
Luke <hide>:<hide> says, “Give, and will given you.”<hide> Sometimes what you get back will something tangible, such the Lord supplying things you need someone giving you, but more often than not what you receive return the satisfaction that you did something good.
Have you ever given someone something they really needed wanted and watched their face light up?
It’s amazing feeling!

Anna Rispoli artist, she carries out plastic and performative work the issues shared property, town planning, collective identity and civic engagement.
Her projects come about result field observations and, particular, zones urban conflict where she meets inhabitants draw their experiences and stories.
These encounters aren’t straightforward all that, they involve reflection the ways approach strangeness but also, sometimes, associating with adversity.
How can speak with what have identified the language the enemy?
How can cross the border between apparently opposing positions, not reconcile them the fantasised about myth the consensual community, but enrich the ways apprehend adversity and our methods conflictual interaction which, don’t forget, are the basis all democracy.
Anna Rispoli invents mechanism which enables make these questions, often repressed our contemporary societies, something which can experienced everyone.
